EXPLANATION: The paper exists and was published in the Journal of Biomolecular NMR in 2012; the discrepancy in the author's name is a minor character encoding issue (Brüschweiler vs Br ¨uschweiler).
LINK: https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s10858-012-9643-4
FOUND_TITLE: PPM: a side-chain and backbone chemical shift predictor for the assessment of protein conformational ensembles
FOUND_AUTHORS: Da-Wei Li, Rafael Brüschweiler
FOUND_YEAR: 2012
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
